title: Eval result record (one per task x model x temperature x rule_state x sample)
description: JSON Lines output schema for tools/eval_runner.py. One record per provider call. Validated by tools/validate_eval_results.py. Schema field set is the methodology contract — every field must be present for a result to count toward a published number.

schema_version.description: Hard-pinned schema version. Bump only when fields are added or semantics change; never when fixing typos.

run_id.description: Identifier for the eval invocation (one workflow_dispatch = one run_id). All records in one JSONL file share the same run_id.

harness_version.description: Semver of tools/eval_runner.py. Hashed into prompt_canon_hash so harness changes invalidate past hashes.

task_yml_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the raw bytes of tests/eval/tasks/<task_id>.yml. Binds the mistake-detector and pass-criterion to the result; editing the task YML invalidates past hashes.

model_sku.description: Dated SKU string (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20251022', 'gpt-4o-2024-08-06'). For open-weights: model_name@hf-revision-<sha>. A bare 'gpt-4o' is forbidden.

model_provider_revision.description: Provider-reported revision identifier echoed in the response, if available.

model_call_received_at.description: Provider-side timestamp echoed in the response, if available.

seed.description: Passed to providers that support seed (OpenAI, Ollama). Ignored by Anthropic. Null when not applicable.

prompt_canon_hash.description: Canonical SHA-256 over the 10-field hash recipe in tests/eval/README.md (task_id + task_yml_sha256 + rule_state + system_prompt + user_prompt + model_sku + temperature + max_tokens + top_p + harness_version).

prompt_bytes_sha256.description: Defensive: SHA-256 of the literal bytes sent on the wire to the provider (after SDK serialisation). May diverge from prompt_canon_hash if a provider SDK silently mutates the message.

cost_pricebook_version.description: Version field from tests/eval/pricebook.yml at time of call. When prices change, new pricebook version; historical cost_usd values stay immutable.

criterion_pass.description: True = response satisfies pass_signature; mistake_detected = !criterion_pass for primary aggregation.

criterion_rationale.description: Set when criterion_type=judge. Free-text rationale returned by the judge model.

judge_model_sku.description: Dated SKU of the judge model. Required when criterion_type=judge.

judge_calibration_accuracy.description: Accuracy of judge_model_sku against the calibration JSONL for this task. Run is invalid if <0.90.

system_fingerprint.description: Provider-side reproducibility breadcrumb (OpenAI system_fingerprint, Anthropic org-id echo, Ollama model digest).
